title: [MTR4] Airliners for MTR - GAP models
description: A320-200, 737-300, CRJ-200 Models from Golden Airport Pack to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
Adds the Airbus **A320-200**, Boeing **737-300** and Bombardier **CRJ-200** models from the Immersive vehicles branch to the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod. 

More Than 50 liveries imported for the A320-200 
More than 30 liveries for the 737-300
As well as 5 liveries for the CRJ-200

All liveries and Models Sourced from the [Golden Airport Pack Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golden-airport-pack-immersive-vehicles-content)
by ooferine along with other livery artists and imported into MTR by me. 

Requires the [Minecraft Transit Railway Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) by jonafanho

Upcoming: A220-300

## **Disclaimer**
This mod is not affiliated with any of the Airlines presented, the Golden Airport Pack Mod and it's developers, ooferine or Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.
